title: Cobblemon Bidoof PC
description: Replace Cobblemon PC background with God Bidoof and change the color of the Pokémon selection arrow.
body:
**Replaces Cobblemons PC background with an image of God Bidoof**

- PC without texture package - PC sin el paquete de textura

![pcantes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65d7a4ae4c1fffa4c1e3663853c8bc6b1dcfdafa.png)
![separador1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2168af4659b32fbf01c8e8c0c563bf228b0643.png)
- PC with texture package - PC con el paquete de textura

![pcfull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93f9e5efd2df660dad71a0a3e98be3c20d7e2856.png)
